---
id: BUG-010
title: reconciler drops the PR number: apply executes partial commands and the table prints 'PR #'
depends_on: []
write_set: ["src/reconcile/**","src/cli/commands/reconcile*"]
requirements: []

---

## Task
Found on the reconciler's FIRST live run (2026-07-11), minutes after PR #129 merged: the PR number never reaches the action - the human table prints "PR #" and, worse, `reconcile --apply` executes `gh pr update-branch` WITH NO ARGUMENT (fails: "no pull requests found for branch main"). Root cause class: the divergence object carries the number but the action formatting/argv construction drops it; AND the RED test asserted the stub executor was CALLED without asserting its ARGV, so the review could not catch it. Fix both:
1. Wire the PR number through the divergence -> action -> argv path (and every other parameter an action needs); the human table prints it.
2. Harden the RED test per the taste lesson: stub executors CAPTURE argv; assertions check the exact command array (['pr','update-branch','129']), not call counts. Extend to all safe actions (close needs id+pr; backup needs nothing; each asserted exactly).
3. Add the missed case: an action whose argv would contain an empty/undefined segment must REFUSE to execute and report (never run a partial command).

## RED test (write first)
Extend the reconciler test with a test named exactly: "apply builds the exact argv for each safe action and refuses partial commands". Fixture divergences: assert captured argv equals the expected arrays; corrupt one divergence to lack the PR number and assert the action is refused and reported, not executed. Today argv drops the number -> it FAILS.
Expected failure cause (literal string in the output): the test name "apply builds the exact argv for each safe action and refuses partial commands".

## Reuse
src/reconcile/** (the merged implementation); its existing test fixtures/stubs.

## Stop conditions
Loosening any existing assertion; executing partial commands with defaults; touching files outside the write_set.

## Evidence required at close
red-test-output, verify-root, final-sha.
